name: GolfCave
address: 10 Schalks Crossing Rd, Plainsboro Township, NJ 08536
about: GolfCave is a 24/7 indoor golf facility that provides golfers of all skill levels with the ability to play or practice in the privacy of their own 'Cave' using TrackMan simulators. Each location offers a personalized approach with lessons incorporating advanced metrics and video analysis. The facilities are designed for both individual practice and group activities, with a focus on a private and modern experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Private 'Caves' for a focused and uninterrupted golf experience
Access to TrackMan, the world's most accurate golf simulator technology
Flexible BYOB policy allowing golfers to bring their own food and drinks
Personalized one-on-one lessons tailored to individual skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Guests can bring their own food or have favorites delivered from nearby restaurants.
BYOB policy is in place, allowing guests to bring their own drinks.

simulator_hardware.notes: World's most accurate golf simulator used across all locations.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state if clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, GolfCave has a BYOB policy, allowing guests to bring their own food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for 18 holes, but it is recommended to check with the location for an estimate.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as beginner-friendly and offers options for families, suggesting it is suitable for children.
